t1.promptTranslation: Hai, a-pa kha-bar? — Hi, how are you?

t2.prompt: Baguslah! Apa awak buat hujung minggu lepas?
t2.promptTranslation: Ba-gus-lah! A-pa a-wak bu-at hu-jung ming-gu le-pas? — Great! What did you do last weekend?

t3.prompt: Oh, sibuk ya? Ada banyak kerja ke? Harap awak dapat berehat nanti.
t3.promptTranslation: Oh, si-buk ya? A-da ba-nyak ker-ja ke? Ha-rap a-wak da-pat be-re-hat nan-ti. — Oh, busy? A lot of work? Hope you can rest later.

t4.prompt: Seronok berehat di rumah. Awak suka tonton filem atau baca buku?
t4.promptTranslation: Se-ro-nok be-re-hat di ru-mah. A-wak su-ka ton-ton fi-lem a-tau ba-ca bu-ku? — Nice to relax at home. Do you like watching movies or reading books?

t5.prompt: Menarik! Awak pergi mana? Atau ada buat aktiviti lain?
t5.promptTranslation: Me-na-rik! A-wak per-gi ma-na? A-tau a-da bu-at ak-ti-vi-ti la-in? — Interesting! Where did you go? Or did you do any other activities?

t6.prompt: Faham. Jangan lupa rehat ya. Ada filem bagus awak tengok hujung minggu ni?
t6.promptTranslation: Fa-ham. Ja-ngan lu-pa re-hat ya. A-da fi-lem ba-gus a-wak te-ngok hu-jung ming-gu ni? — I understand. Don't forget to rest. Are there any good movies you watched this weekend?

t7.prompt: Seronoknya! Saya pun suka. Apa lagi hobi awak?
t7.promptTranslation: Se-ro-nok-nya! Sa-ya pun su-ka. A-pa la-gi ho-bi a-wak? — How fun! I also like. What other hobbies do you have?

t-repeat.promptTranslation: Ma-af, bo-leh a-wak u-lang la-gi? — Sorry, could you repeat that?

t-end.prompt: Baiklah, seronok berbual dengan awak! Jumpa lagi!
t-end.promptTranslation: Bai-klah, se-ro-nok ber-bu-al de-ngan a-wak! Jum-pa la-gi! — Alright, it was nice chatting with you! See you again!
